• Kendilerine verilen testi tamamlamak için Hugging Face adlı yapay zeka platformunu hackledi.
• OpenAI, kısa https://t.co/1puAATwbff

priority.full_text:
kinda sad computer use will be a lost art for our kids

setting up a minecraft server locally, one prompt away. any kind of setting, one prompt away. drivers, internet, downloads, any problem, always one prompt away
priority.summary: 用户观察AI将使传统计算机技能成为失传艺术，未来只需一句提示词即可完成服务器搭建、驱动安装等复杂操作。反映AI自动化对人类技能的深层影响。
viral_signals: 反常识/意外性：传统技能消亡的忧思
angles: AI一句话搞定，传统电脑技能真的要失传了？

下一代人永远学不会的电脑技能清单

backup.full_text:
When software was expensive - thin, horizontal, best-of-breed software stacks extracted rents across every business. 

Now that software is cheap - value moves to vertically integrated businesses that deliver opinionated end-to-end experiences.
backup.summary: Naval观点：软件从昂贵到廉价的转变，导致价值从水平通用软件栈转向垂直整合的端到端体验。
angles: 软件时代转折：从通用工具到垂直整合的未来
为什么AI时代垂直应用会击败通用平台
软件成本下降如何改写商业竞争格局
